components-avatar.name: Avatar

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet: const Default = () => <Avatar fallback="JD" size="md" variant="circle" />;
stories.description: The default avatar with fallback initials. Renders as a medium circle when no image source is provided.

stories.name: With Image
stories.snippet:
const WithImage = () => <Avatar
    fallback="JD"
    size="md"
    variant="circle"
    src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502823403499-6ccfcf4fb453?&w=256&h=256&q=70&crop=focalpoint&fp-x=0.5&fp-y=0.3&fp-z=1&fit=crop"
    alt="Alex Morgan" />;
stories.description: Avatar displaying a user profile photo. The image fills the avatar shape and the fallback is hidden while the image loads successfully.

stories.name: With Fallback Initials
stories.snippet:
const WithFallbackInitials = () => <Avatar
    fallback="AM"
    size="md"
    variant="circle"
    src="https://broken-url.example/photo.jpg" />;
stories.description: When the image fails to load, the fallback content is displayed. Pass initials, an icon, or any ReactNode as the `fallback` prop.
stories.summary: Fallback content shown when image is unavailable

stories.name: Circle
stories.snippet: const Circle = () => <Avatar fallback="CR" size="md" variant="circle" />;
stories.description: The circle variant is the default shape, ideal for user profile photos.

stories.name: Square
stories.snippet: const Square = () => <Avatar fallback="WS" size="md" variant="square" />;
stories.description: The square variant uses a rounded rectangle, suitable for workspace, team, or organization icons.

stories.name: Pillow
stories.snippet: const Pillow = () => <Avatar fallback="PL" size="md" variant="pillow" />;
stories.description: The pillow variant uses a soft, organic squircle shape for a friendly and distinctive appearance.

stories.name: Pentagon
stories.snippet: const Pentagon = () => <Avatar fallback="PT" size="md" variant="pentagon" />;
stories.description: The pentagon variant uses a five-sided mask for a unique visual identity. Note: the border is hidden in this variant due to the mask shape.

stories.name: Size Xs
stories.snippet: const SizeXs = () => <Avatar fallback="XS" size="xs" variant="circle" />;
stories.description: Extra-small avatar (24px) for dense lists and inline indicators.

stories.name: Size Sm
stories.snippet: const SizeSm = () => <Avatar fallback="SM" size="sm" variant="circle" />;
stories.description: Small avatar (32px) for compact layouts and table rows.

stories.name: Size Lg
stories.snippet: const SizeLg = () => <Avatar fallback="LG" size="lg" variant="circle" />;
stories.description: Large avatar (48px) for profile sections and detail views.

stories.name: Size Xl
stories.snippet: const SizeXl = () => <Avatar fallback="XL" size="xl" variant="circle" />;
stories.description: Extra-large avatar (64px) for hero sections and prominent display.

stories.name: Colorized
stories.snippet: const Colorized = () => <Avatar fallback="JD" size="md" variant="circle" colorize="jane doe" />;
stories.description: The `colorize` prop deterministically maps a string (typically a user name) to a color from the palette, applying a tinted background and matching text color. Useful for distinguishing users in lists without profile photos.
stories.summary: Colorized avatar based on user name

stories.name: All Colorized
stories.description: Multiple colorized avatars showing how different names map to different colors from the palette for visual distinction.
stories.summary: Multiple colorized avatars for visual distinction

stories.name: All Sizes
stories.description: All available sizes displayed together for visual comparison. Sizes range from `xs` (24px) to `4xl` (128px).
stories.summary: Visual comparison of all avatar sizes

stories.name: All Sizes With Image
stories.description: All sizes with a profile image to verify image scaling and quality across the full size range from `xs` (24px) to `4xl` (128px).
stories.summary: All avatar sizes with a profile image

stories.name: All Variants
stories.description: All available shape variants displayed together for visual comparison. Each variant serves a different use case: user photos, workspaces, friendly branding, and unique identity.
stories.summary: Visual comparison of all avatar shapes

stories.name: All Variants With Image
stories.description: All shape variants with a profile image to show how each mask clips the photo. Particularly useful for verifying the pentagon mask and pillow shape render correctly with real imagery.
stories.summary: All avatar shapes with a profile image

components-avatar.description: Avatar displays a user's profile image, initials, or a fallback icon. Use for user identification in lists, headers, cards, and comment threads. Supports multiple shapes (`circle`, `square`, `pillow`, `pentagon`) and sizes from `xs` (24px) to `4xl` (128px).

tags.summary: Displays a user's profile image, initials, or fallback icon
tags.example:
<Avatar src="/photos/jane.jpg" alt="Jane Doe" size="md" variant="circle" />
<Avatar fallback="JD" size="lg" variant="square" />

reactDocgenTypescript.description: Avatar displays a user's profile image, initials, or a fallback icon. Use Avatar for user identification in lists, headers, cards, and comment threads. Do **not** use Avatar for decorative images or thumbnails unrelated to a person or entity — use a standard `` or a Thumbnail component instead. Renders an image when `src` is provided; otherwise displays `fallback` content (typically initials or an icon). Built on Radix UI Avatar primitives. Available shapes: `circle` (default), `square`, `pillow`, and `pentagon`. Sizes range from `xs` (24px) to `4xl` (128px), defaulting to `md` (40px).

alt.description: Accessible alt text describing the avatar image. Required when `src` is provided.
alt.name: alt

src.description: Image URL to display. When unavailable or loading fails, `fallback` content is shown instead.
src.name: src

fallback.description: Content rendered when `src` is missing or fails to load. Typically user initials (e.g., "JD") or an icon.
fallback.name: fallback

colorize.description:
When provided, deterministically maps the string (typically a user name) to a
color from the palette, applying a light background, matching text color, and
border color. Useful for distinguishing users in lists without profile photos.
colorize.name: colorize

size.description:
Controls the avatar dimensions. Defaults to `'md'` (40px).
- `xs` (24px) — inline indicators, dense lists
- `sm` (32px) — compact layouts, table rows
- `md` (40px) — standard usage, cards, headers
- `lg` (48px) — profile sections, detail views
- `xl` (64px) — hero sections, prominent display
- `2xl` (80px), `3xl` (96px), `4xl` (128px) — large feature areas, profile pages
size.name: size

variant.description:
Shape of the avatar container. Defaults to `'circle'`.
- `circle` — standard round avatar for user photos
- `square` — rounded rectangle, suitable for workspace or team icons
- `pillow` — soft, organic squircle shape
- `pentagon` — distinctive five-sided shape for unique visual identity
variant.name: variant

foundations-icons.name: Icons

stories.name: Sizes
stories.snippet:
const Sizes = () => (
sm (16px)
md (20px)
lg (24px)
);
stories.description: Three canonical sizes — `sm` (16px), `md` (20px, default), `lg` (24px). Apply via `iconStyles({ size })` on any SVG from `lucide-react`.

stories.name: Colors
stories.snippet:
const Colors = () => (
primary
secondary
tertiary
danger
positive
);
stories.description: Icons inherit color via `currentColor`. Drive them from semantic tokens on the parent (`text-icon-default-base-*`) so they stay in sync with the surrounding UI state.

stories.name: Gallery
stories.description: A sample set of icons from `lucide-react`. The full catalogue (~1500 icons) is available at https://lucide.dev/icons — import by name as needed.

stories.name: In Composition
stories.description: Demonstrates the intended usage pattern: icons live inside composed components (buttons, inputs, badges) that own their own sizing slot.
